mapper.sql: select point_name, point_type, address, longitude, latitude, service_hours, tel from dim_ic_points
mapper.select:
AND point_name like concat('%', #{pointName}, '%')
AND point_type = #{pointType}
AND address like concat('%', #{address}, '%')
order by point_name
SELECT point_name as pointName, point_type as pointType, address, longitude, latitude, service_hours as serviceHours, tel FROM dim_ic_points ORDER BY point_name

SELECT point_type as pointType, COUNT(*) as count, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_ic_points) * 100 as percentage FROM dim_ic_points GROUP BY point_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT point_name as pointName, point_type as pointType, address, longitude, latitude, service_hours as serviceHours, tel, CASE point_type WHEN '充值点' THEN '#0000FF' WHEN '退卡点' THEN '#FF0000' WHEN '综合点' THEN '#00FF00' ELSE '#FFFF00' END as color FROM dim_ic_points WHERE longitude IS NOT NULL AND latitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY point_name
